# Watson Toolkit Sync Manifest
# ============================
# Tracks source of truth for each skill in the toolkit.
# Prefixes:
#   gh:   = GitHub-managed (pulled via sync-github-skills.sh, do not edit locally)
#   oc:   = OpenClaw source (~/.openclaw/skills/)
#   cc:   = Claude Code source (~/.claude/skills/)
#
# GitHub-managed skills are updated by running: ./sync-github-skills.sh
# Local-synced skills are updated by running:   ./sync-watson-toolkit.sh --apply
#
# Last updated: 2026-03-30 (v1.5.0, 20 skills)

# ─── GITHUB-MANAGED (8) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# These have standalone repos. Do not edit the toolkit copy directly.
# Run ./sync-github-skills.sh to pull upstream changes.

gh:complete-code-review    # jeremyknows/complete-code-review
gh:decide                  # jeremyknows/decide
gh:humanizer               # blader/humanizer (3rd party)
gh:prism                   # jeremyknows/PRISM
gh:publish-skills          # jeremyknows/publish-skills
gh:random-thought          # jeremyknows/random-thought
gh:skill-doctor            # jeremyknows/skill-doctor
gh:x-fetch                 # jeremyknows/x-fetch

# ─── LOCAL-SYNCED FROM OPENCLAW (7) ──────────────────────────────────────────
# Source: ~/.openclaw/skills/<name>/
# Edit there, then run: ./sync-watson-toolkit.sh --apply

oc:brainstorming
oc:grill-me
oc:intellectual-honesty
oc:playground
oc:publish-cowork-plugin
oc:receiving-feedback
oc:sprint-cowork

# ─── LOCAL-SYNCED FROM CLAUDE CODE (5) ───────────────────────────────────────
# Source: ~/.claude/skills/<name>/
# Edit there, then run: ./sync-watson-toolkit.sh --apply

cc:autoresearch
cc:doc-coauthoring
cc:plan-review
cc:systematic-debugging
cc:writing-plans

# ─── EXCLUDED (do not add) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# VeeFriends skills → separate plugin
# OpenClaw infra: dispatch-message, dispatching-parallel-agents, emergency-commands,
#   executing-plans, restart-mc, unified-feature-dev, v2-*, unified-commands
# Crypto/blockchain: coingecko, helius, eth-readonly, bankr-polymarket-openclaw
# Project-specific: mirofish, miroprism, nano-banana-pro, grok-1.0.3, fal-ai-community
# Stale: build-feature.bak-2026-03-18, jeremyknows.md, claude-context-audit
# Removed in v1.5.0: docx, pptx, pdf, xlsx, skill-creator, canvas-design,
#   deep-research, frontend-design, improve-codebase-architecture, jackbutcher-voice,
#   last30days, make-interfaces-feel-better, markdown-fetch, prd-to-issues,
#   proposal-maker, ubiquitous-language, update-docs, web-artifacts-builder,
#   write-a-prd, x-master (x-master has its own standalone repo)
